breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Kill-Shot Demotion: Dome Author Walks Back Two of Six Confirmed Kills
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: On 2026-04-17 the dome author demoted Sydney-Perth and Polaris from CONFIRMED (globe falsified) to STRUCTURAL SUPPORT / SUPPORTIVE ONLY and replaced the binary-knockout falsification rule. The two demoted rows are exactly the two whose test windows had closed. Section 5.0 in our Kill-Shots tab now documents the before/after verbatim with dated commit.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: First self-initiated demotion of confirmed status on kill-shot page; falsification rule also rewritten in same commit.
